title: tillandsia elongata var. subimbricata
intro: Tillandsia elongata var. subimbricata, also known as the Elongated Tillandsia or Puna Airplant, is a type of epiphytic succulent plant that grows in the Andean regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia elongata var. subimbricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
